meaning: adj.[物] 运动学的,运动学上的
examples: The objective is to evaluate the role of sperm kinematic parameters in the hyperactivation of Guinea pig spermatozoa.
Kinematic Rigidbodies are not affected by forces, gravity or collisions.
The equations of equilibrium and kinematic relations are independent of the type of material .
As Oculus' full-time principle scientist, LaValle will be working on things like sensor fusion, magnetic drift correction, and kinematic modeling.
